html:
Exclusive to:

The Life Jacket is a craftable item introduced in Shipwrecked DLC, found in the Nautical Tab. It requires a Science Machine to prototype, and can be crafted using 2 Cloth, 2 Vine, and 3 Empty Bottles. When worn it will save the player from Drowning in the Ocean if their Boats reach 0 durability while sailing. When the Life Jacket saves the player, the screen will fade to black, and the player Character will appear on the nearest Beach with enough Cut Grass and Logs to make a Log Raft.

Tips

  • If the Boat that the player is using is at a low durability, or they intend to be on a long journey, a Life Jacket is a possible inventory item to stay safe. If the boat is at a critically low durability (e.g., 3%), one can quickly equip the Life Jacket.

Trivia

  • Woodlegs used to have a perk identical to that of the Life Jacket. The perk was removed in the Seas the Day update.

Gallery

  • Wilson wearing a Life Jacket.
  • Willow wearing a Life Jacket.
  • Wolfgang wearing a Life Jacket.
  • Wendy wearing a Life Jacket.
  • WX-78 wearing a Life Jacket.
  • Wickerbottom wearing a Life Jacket.
  • Woodie wearing a Life Jacket.
  • Wes wearing a Life Jacket.
  • Maxwell wearing a Life Jacket.
  • Wigfrid wearing a Life Jacket.
  • Webber wearing a Life Jacket.
  • Walani wearing a Life Jacket.
  • Warly wearing a Life Jacket.
  • Wilbur wearing a Life Jacket.
  • Woodlegs wearing a Life Jacket.
  • Wilba wearing a Life Jacket.
  • Wormwood wearing a Life Jacket.
  • Wheeler wearing a Life Jacket.

Life Jacket
"Safety first!"
×2 ×2 ×3
Tab
Tier
1 use

Perk

Dropped by
"armor_lifejacket"
“Keeps me afloat, without my boat!”
–Wilson
“But will it keep my lighter dry?”
–Willow
“Big seawater will not take Wolfgang now!”
–Wolfgang
“I'd prefer a dry grave, thank you.”
–Wendy
“ELIMINATES DEATH OUTCOME FROM SHIPWRECKING EVENTS”
–WX-78
“Safety first!”
–Wickerbottom
“A lil reassurance.”
–Woodie
“Sadly my cultured countenance must take a backseat to sensibility.”
–Maxwell
“Ingenious! The empty glass bottles will keep me buoyant!”
–Wagstaff
“Adventure öffers nö true safety!”
–Wigfrid
“It pays to be safe.”
–Webber
“In case the waves get all gnar'.”
–Walani
“Better safe than sorry.”
–Warly
“Bah! For swabs only!”
–Woodlegs
“'TIS FOR NAUGHT DROWN'DING”
–Wilba
“Water saver”
–Wormwood
“It's like a parachute for a boat.”
–Wheeler

When the Life Jacket saves the player, the screen will fade to black, and the player Character will appear on the nearest Beach with enough Cut Grass and Logs to make a Log Raft.

If the Boat that the player is using is at a low durability, or they intend to be on a long journey, a Life Jacket is a possible inventory item to stay safe. If the boat is at a critically low durability (e.g., 3%), one can quickly equip the Life Jacket.
Trivia[edit | edit source]
Woodlegs used to have a perk identical to that of the Life Jacket. The perk was removed in the Seas the Day update.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Áo Phao là một vật phẩm chế tạo được giới thiệu trong Shipwrecked DLC, được tìm thấy trong Thẻ Hàng Hải. Nó yêu cầu Máy Khoa học để tạo nguyên mẫu và có thể chế tạo bằng cách sử dụng 2 Vải, 2 Dây Nho và 3 Chai Rỗng. Khi đeo nó sẽ cứu người chơi khỏi Chết đuối trong Đại dương nếu Thuyền của họ đạt độ bền bằng 0 khi chèo thuyền. Khi Áo Phao cứu người chơi, màn hình sẽ chuyển sang màu đen và Nhân vật của người chơi sẽ xuất hiện trên Bãi biển gần nhất với đủ Cỏ Cắt và Gỗ để làm Bè Gỗ.

The '''Life Jacket''' is a craftable [[item]] introduced in ''[[Don't Starve: Shipwrecked|Shipwrecked]]'' DLC, found in the [[Nautical Tab]]. It requires a [[Science Machine]] to prototype, and can be crafted using 2 [[Cloth]], 2 [[Vine]], and 3 [[Empty Bottle]]s. When worn it will save the player from [[Death|Drowning]] in the [[Ocean]] if their [[Boats]] reach 0 durability while sailing. When the Life Jacket saves the player, the screen will fade to black, and the player [[Character]] will appear on the nearest [[Beach]] with enough [[Cut Grass]] and [[Logs]] to make a [[Log Raft]].

== {{pic32|Prototype}} Tips ==
* If the Boat that the player is using is at a low durability, or they intend to be on a long journey, a Life Jacket is a possible inventory item to stay safe. If the boat is at a critically low durability (e.g., 3%), one can quickly equip the Life Jacket.

== {{pic32|Placeholder}} Trivia ==
* [[Woodlegs]] used to have a perk identical to that of the Life Jacket. The perk was removed in the ''[[Don't Starve: Shipwrecked#Version History|Seas the Day]]'' update.
